seoTitle: Doonan vs Dotswood — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Doonan and Dotswood. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Doonan and Dotswood.
heading: Doonan vs Dotswood — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Doonan, Queensland and Dotswood, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Doonan and Dotswood have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Doonan or Dotswood safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Doonan has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Dotswood scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Doonan scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Dotswood scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Doonan or Dotswood?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Doonan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
